speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: The corpse is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are antagonistic toward it or it recognizes you as an enemy.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no answer truthfulness condition.
speak-with-dead.issue: Answer truthfulness depends on social relationship, but runtime has no field for this.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime answerBehavior data for no truth compulsion when antagonistic or enemy-recognized.

speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: The corpse knows only what it knew in life, cannot learn new information, does not comprehend anything since it died, and cannot speculate about future events.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
speak-with-dead.issue: The corpse knowledge boundaries are not represented.
speak-with-dead.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledgeBoundary fields for life knowledge, no new information, no post-death comprehension, no future speculation.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgeLimits data for the corpse answers.

speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: The corpse must have a mouth, and this spell fails if the deceased creature was Undead when it died.
speak-with-dead.structuredState: No corpse anatomy or died-as-Undead failure fields.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime targeting has no corpse mouth or former-Undead filters.
speak-with-dead.issue: Speak with Dead has target failure conditions based on corpse mouth and creature type at death.
speak-with-dead.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpse target filters for hasMouth and wasUndeadWhenDied.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetFilter corpseHasMouth true and failsIfWasUndeadWhenDied true.

speak-with-dead.canonicalEvidence: The spell fails if the corpse was the target of this spell within the past 10 days. Until the spell ends, you can ask the corpse up to five questions.
speak-with-dead.structuredState: No prior-target cooldown or question-count ending fields.
speak-with-dead.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no 10-day lockout or question limit.
speak-with-dead.issue: Speak with Dead has a 10-day retarget failure and a five-question limit.
speak-with-dead.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime castFailure if targetedWithinPastDays 10 and maxQuestions 5.

speak-with-plants.canonicalEvidence: You can turn Difficult Terrain caused by plant growth into ordinary terrain, or ordinary terrain where plants are present into Difficult Terrain.
speak-with-plants.structuredState: Area Shape now Emanation; no terrain conversion fields.
speak-with-plants.jsonState: Runtime area shape now Emanation, but terrain conversion is prose-only.
speak-with-plants.issue: Speak with Plants can convert plant-related difficult/ordinary terrain in either direction.
speak-with-plants.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plant terrain conversion mode fields.
speak-with-plants.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainConversion data for difficult-to-ordinary and ordinary-with-plants-to-difficult.

speak-with-plants.canonicalEvidence: Plants gain ability to communicate with you and follow simple commands. If a Plant creature is in the area, you can communicate with it as if you shared a common language.
speak-with-plants.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
speak-with-plants.issue: Plant communication and shared-language communication with Plant creatures are not typed.
speak-with-plants.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plant communication and common-language fields.
speak-with-plants.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication data for plants and Plant creatures.

speak-with-plants.canonicalEvidence: You imbue plants with limited sentience and animation, giving them the ability to communicate with you and follow your simple commands.
speak-with-plants.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no commandable plant state.
speak-with-plants.issue: The spell animates plants for limited commands without uprooting movement, but runtime has no plant state/control data.
speak-with-plants.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plant sentience/animation command fields and no-uproot movement limit.
speak-with-plants.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantAnimation data for limited sentience, simple commands, branch/tendril/stalk movement, and cannotUproot.

speak-with-plants.canonicalEvidence: You can question plants about events in the spell area within the past day, gaining information about creatures that have passed, weather, and other circumstances.
speak-with-plants.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
speak-with-plants.issue: The spell exposes one-day local event history through plants and can alter plant terrain, but both are prose-only.
speak-with-plants.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plant memory/event-history and terrain conversion fields.
speak-with-plants.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantKnowledge data for last 1 day creatures/weather/circumstances and terrain conversion data.

speak-with-plants.canonicalEvidence: You imbue plants in an immobile 30-foot Emanation.
speak-with-plants.issue: The Emanation shape is represented after correction.
speak-with-plants.recommendedTemplateChange: No area shape change required for this row.
speak-with-plants.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by changing structured and runtime area shape from Sphere to Emanation.

spirit-guardians.canonicalEvidence: If you are good or neutral, their spectral form appears angelic or fey (your choice). If you are evil, they appear fiendish.
spirit-guardians.structuredState: Damage Type is Radiant/Necrotic; no alignment-based form or damage-type choice fields.
spirit-guardians.jsonState: Runtime damage type is flattened as Radiant/Necrotic.
spirit-guardians.issue: Spirit Guardians ties spectral form and damage type to caster alignment, with a good/neutral appearance choice.
spirit-guardians.recommendedTemplateChange: Add caster-alignment damage/form mapping and appearance choice fields.
spirit-guardians.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime alignmentMode data: good/neutral Radiant with angelic/fey appearance choice, evil Necrotic fiendish.
